positive: A vibrant, synthwave-inspired portrait of a chrome samurai standing on a rainy neon-lit street in a futuristic megalopolis. The art style should combine retro-futurism, vaporwave colors (magenta, cyan, electric blue), and detailed mechanical elements. Cinematic lighting, highly saturated.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, washed out, muddy colors, realistic photography
